testcase.name: submitOrder[{productToAdd=ZARA COAT 3, passw=Roopa@123, username=abc@gmail.com}](1)
testcase.system-out: true Product Added To Cart Till Product func ZARA COAT 3 https://rahulshettyacademy.com/client/#/dashboard/order?prop=%5B%226960eac0c941646b7a8b3e68%22%5D Cecked out for country selBritish Indian Ocean Territory India Successfull from framework structure
